chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1411 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.5474/2022 2. For hearing of main case 05-10-2023 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Laghari, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General a/w Sajjad Ahmed Simair CMO Pano Akil and Altaf Ahmed Accounts Officer Town Committee Pano Akil.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Sajjad Ahmed Simair CMO Pano Akil has appeared and submits that Rs.1400,000/- of petitioners from Octroi Zila Tax is outstanding which will be paid to the petitioners in three equal monthly installments. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. However, default in payment shall expose the respondents to contempt proceedings. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
